violations.text: Per PIC, pork in establishment was made at home. Food must come from an approved source. Pork was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Grilled chicken and deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Multiple floor tiles in the ware washing area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The ceiling in the ware washing area, and floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
Prep unit #2 lid is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The floor in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink and spray bottles were observed exceeding 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Sanitizer was diluted to 300 ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Prep unit #2 was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. All food in unit was observed between 50-55 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the prep unit refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
Prep unit #2 lid is in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025
The floor in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2026
